meta.title: Shaper: Data Shaper (default)
description: Shaper: Data Shaper (default) replays live-power input through the current shaper rather than solar-divert control.
Baseline current-shaper behavior using the standard smoothing, max-power, and pause settings.
Compare live power, smoothed live power, shaper maximum, available charge power, and actual charge power to see how the limiter reacts.
